## Recall Queries

<!-- Quick reference for common searches -->
- **By Project:** `grep "Project: [name]" docs/session-diary.md`
- **By Decision:** `grep "Decision:" docs/session-diary.md`
- **By File:** `grep "[filename]" docs/session-diary.md`
- **By Date:** `grep "## [YYYY-MM-DD]" docs/session-diary.md`
